jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Licious
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Licious in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
